description: Execute V0.8-M2: Implement the dynamic capability registry schema and construct the foundational LLM Router in the MCP Server that parses YAML workflows and matches them to user intent.
scope: 1. Modify bin/agent-protocol-init to generate the default .agent-state/registry.json scaffolding. 2. Create src/mcp-server/src/router.ts to define the LLM prompt template that evaluates an input string against available workflows in .agent-state/workflows/*.yaml. 3. Update documentation to reflect the dynamic registry process.
out_of_scope: Strictly NO porting of the 17 workflows (M3). NO SubAgent review automation daemon logic (M4). NO removal of legacy tooling. NO modifications to active workflow/dispatch.json state semantics outside of standard M2 progression.
stop_conditions: Attempting to modify any file outside allowed_files.
Attempting to write actual workflow porting logic.
Executing without an approved M2 contract.
